programmes.show_description: From distracted drivers to animals on the attack and an unmissable heroic rescue - join us for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam. (S6, ep 2)
Yvonne McCann: The tragic story behind the killing of Yvonne McCann, murdered by her husband after a row at home in 2020.
A sniper attack on the motorway puts police on full alert, and a man tries to run from police on foot but nature interferes with his getaway. (S16, ep 7)
Cameras capture an unbelievable smash as a drunk pushes his speed to the limit and a man thinks it's a good idea to hitch a ride with police. (S16, ep 8)
Police call on multiple units and the Eagle helicopter as they hunt a stolen Subaru and a cyclist can't quite comprehend why he can't bike along the motorway. (S16, ep 9)
A Kiwi stag night ditches the Aussie brother-in-law to be and a car crash leads to some unusual behaviour on the side of the motorway. (S16, ep 10)

A Brazilian man hiding a large quantity of cocaine is busted at Auckland Airport. Plus, a woman with undeclared seeds loses her cool with Biosecurity. (S11, ep 7)
Immigration deal with a Chinese national using a fake passport, while custom discover a huge stash of meth hidden among household items. (S11, ep 8)
Staff at Auckland Airport meet a Greek man with no money but a rich history, while Customs find jeans with more than just dodgy labels to hide. (S11, ep 9)
Customs deal with a Lithuanian man who has very questionable holiday plans and a risky item lands at the International Mail Centre. (S11, ep 10)
Officers investigate the suspicious luggage of a man returning from China and Vietnam. Drug detector dog Vulcan makes an amazing find. (S15, ep 15)
Border Force zero in on two men trying to avoid luggage checks as a search of their bags reveals why. There's a million-dollar find in the Mail Centre. (S15, ep 16)
Border Force are concerned when a man travelling from South America doesn't know the combination to open his suitcase. Officers uncover a backpack filled with drugs. (S15, ep 17)
A deadly parcel turns up at the Mail Centre. A suspicious bottle of cologne is investigated, and a couple are caught with a prohibited item that shocks Biosecurity. (S15, ep 18)
Find more spectacular crashes and roadside disasters in a new episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 7)
From pesky traffic tricksters, navigation nightmares and terrifying tornadoes - join us for another exciting episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 8)
Three visitors from Malaysia raise alarms when it emerges that they've cancelled their accommodation just before their flight and their lies begin to unravel. (S15, ep 9)
When a Chinese bulk carrier docks in Newcastle it appears there's been a major security breach and what the Border Force officers find is shocking. (S15, ep 10)
Border Force investigate the claims of two people who claim to be on their honeymoon when their travel itinerary raises alarm bells. (S15, ep 11)
A man struggles to explain what his plans are for a three-month trip to Australia, and suspicion heightens when a drug dog takes an interest in his bag. (S15, ep 12)

programmes.show_name: FILM: For The Love Of Lily
programmes.show_description: When a no-nonsense consultant is tasked by her boss to make the office greener, she partners up with a rooftop florist to make their building come alive. (2024)(89 mins)
The Partners: Check out some of the most remarkable bonds between man and dog in a special look at incredible human and canine partnerships. (S1, ep 3)
Coasts: Patrick Aryee examines the amazing animals that live on the coast. From crashing waves to extreme tides, surviving here takes ingenuity and incredible adaptations. (S1, ep 3)
Sharks of the Pacific Ocean: Join Steve as he tracks down 'shark hotspots' in the Pacific Ocean and works out how to protect them. (S1, ep 3)
A look at the clever new methods the police and public are using to catch criminals. (S7, ep 8)

For one night only, Rob and Romesh join the London Philharmonic Orchestra for what promises to be a memorable performance at a packed-out Royal Festival Hall. (S5, ep 4)
Ashley's cousin is kidnapped for a ransom - and when the boys lose the money, they need a backup plan. Strong language/adult humour. (S3, ep 3)
Katherine Ryan makes a welcome return to the stage in this stand-up special. Having previously denounced partnership, Katherine has since married her first love... accidentally.
Strap in for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam, with more thrills and spills from the world of driving - all caught on camera! (S6, ep 3)
An angry woman breaks the law but demands police help, a dim car thief is caught on camera and there's the strangest of incidents involving a drive shaft and 11 cars. (S16, ep 11)
Two elderly pedestrians take a wrong turn and dice with death, a taxi driver dumps his passengers on the motorway and police track a car filled with suspected criminals. (S16, ep 12)
A frightening case of road rage unfolds as a drunk man attacks another car with an axe and a truck takes out a car in spectacular fashion. (S16, ep 13)
A pedestrian is lucky to be alive after a stroll down the motorway and a commuter spies another driver doing something he shouldn't. (S16, ep 14)
When a truck crashes the driver tries to lie his way out of trouble, unaware that cameras have caught it all. (S16, ep 15)

The Light: SG-1 travels to a planet where they find themselves transfixed by a beautiful but deadly device. (S4, ep 18)

Shadows Of P'jem: The crew are disappointed to learn that T'Pol has been ordered to leave the Enterprise, even more so when they see her own indifference to leaving. (S1, ep 15)
